steps.t: Mírthar does not have the strength to make the healing concoction and has asked that you bring the supplies to Lóburdith, the healer in Sul Madásh, as…
Lóburdith has asked for your help making the healing concoction that Mírthar needs. Use the table nearby to create the mixture.
Lóburdith has asked for your help making the healing concoction that Mírthar needs. Use the table nearby to create the mixture.
You have successfully created the concoction that Mírthar needs. Return to Lóburdith so that she can do the final preparations.
